/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_game_flow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_gamedata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_database.cpp.o -o unit_tests  ../lib/libgtest_main.a ../src/libcore_lib.a ../lib/libgtest.a ../_deps/fmt-build/libfmt.a ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/libSDL3_ttf.so.0.2.2 /usr/lib/libSDL3.so.0.4.12
